name: Melody Music
description: A Telegram Music Player Bot, written in Python with Pyrogram and Py-Tgcalls.

MONGO_DB_URI.description: Get a mongodb url from https://cloud.mongodb.com.

MONGO_DB_NAME.description: The name of the database in MongoDB (Default: Melody).

OWNER_ID.description: The user id of user whom you would like to add as OWNER.

DEV_ID.description: Optional: User ID of the DEVELOPER. Defaults to OWNER_ID if not provided.

STRING_SESSION.description: A Pyrogram v2 String Session. Generate it from: https://telegram.tools/session-string-generator#pyrogram,user

STRING_SESSION2.description: Optional: A second Pyrogram v2 String Session. Generate it from: https://telegram.tools/session-string-generator#pyrogram,user

STRING_SESSION3.description: Optional: A third Pyrogram v2 String Session. Generate it from: https://telegram.tools/session-string-generator#pyrogram,user

STRING_SESSION4.description: Optional: A fourth Pyrogram v2 String Session. Generate it from: https://telegram.tools/session-string-generator#pyrogram,user

STRING_SESSION5.description: Optional: A fifth Pyrogram v2 String Session. Generate it from: https://telegram.tools/session-string-generator#pyrogram,user

LOG_GROUP_ID.description: Optional: Your Log Group ID. Defaults to OWNER_ID if not provided.

YT_API_URL.description: External API URL for YouTube downloads.

COOKIES_URL.description: Link to your YouTube cookies (e.g. Batbin link).

START_IMG_URL.description: Image that appears with the /start command

DURATION_LIMIT.description: Maximum duration allowed for tracks (in minutes).

REDIS_URI.description: Optional: Redis URI for ultra-fast caching (e.g. Upstash).

PLAYLIST_FETCH_LIMIT.description: Maximum number of tracks to fetch from a playlist.

AUTO_LEAVING_ASSISTANT.description: Whether the assistant should automatically leave inactive chats.

WEB_SERVICE.description: Set to True to enable the FastAPI background service (prevents idling).
